description: Alpine Holdings S.A. — Luxembourg — Dividend — UNCERTAIN (MLI PPT + thin holding)
legal_notes: Intermediate holding company. Luxembourg treaty: MLI PPT applies; Art. 8 MLI reserved. Reduced dividend rate: 0% at ≥25% threshold (2012 Protocol). Substance is limited — one office, two employees. BO condition (ii) — no pass-on obligation — is unclear. PPT risk: structure may be arranged primarily to obtain treaty benefit. Data file data/example_input.json used as source.

input.substance_notes: Luxembourg holding company. Registered office in Luxembourg City. Two employees (directors). No employees other than directors. IP and treasury functions managed by parent. Receives dividends from Polish subsidiary and on-distributes to parent. No independent decision-making on investment.
